title: 37691 Stationery Tubs Pencil Erasers - Assorted Colours (Pack of 25)
description: Product Description Whitecroft Essentials is a leading supplier of stationery around the world and these popular desk top tubs are their ultimate bestsellers! Not only do they offer great quality stationery items, the tubs are the ideal solution to keep your space organised, perfect for messy drawers, desks and shelves everywhere! If you are searching for back to school, back to uni or back to work products - or even just standard household stationery - Whitecroft Essentials stationery tubs are exactly what you need. These assorted pencil erasers are the perfect accompaniment to any pencil case, office desk or home drawer! Being experts in the field, Whitecroft Essentials only provide the best - these erasers are great quality to ensure the best functionality while bringing an extra flash of pastel colour! Box Contains Essential Stationery Tubs: Pencil Erasers - Assorted Colours (25 per tub)
